news.title: Field-tested: Michigan Tech Grad Hikes from Isle Royale Research to a National Park Service Career
news.summary_en: Backpacking off-trail for a month over a more than 200-square-mile island chain is more demanding than your average camping trip. But for graduating Michigan Tech senior Jacob Sutter, wild places like Isle Royale National Park are where he finds happiness.  . . .

news.title: Michigan Tech Researchers Develop Sustainable Building Material from Wood Waste
news.summary_en: More efficient use of lumber byproducts leads to more sustainable forest management. That's why Michigan Technological University researchers are developing a biomaterial lighter than steel and just as strong, made from leftover wood waste, that could revolutionize the lumber industry.  . . .
